$comment: Module registry for the central docs hub aggregation (AAASM-3659). Each entry is a module whose docs are built from its default channel (master/main HEAD) and mounted under /<subpath>/ in the aggregated site. 'ref' pins the checkout; use a tag/SHA to pin a release line. The hub mdBook itself is built from THIS repo at root and is not listed here.

modules.name: core
modules.base_url_strategy: mdBook emits root-relative asset paths, so it is subpath-safe with no flag.

modules.name: python-sdk
modules.channel: default (master HEAD; mike channels not aggregated, see AGGREGATION.md)
modules.base_url_strategy: uv sync --group docs; mkdocs build --site-dir <out>. mkdocs-material emits relative asset paths; site_url already points at /python-sdk/.
modules.build: uv sync --group docs && uv run mkdocs build --site-dir <out>

modules.name: node-sdk
modules.channel: default (lastVersion served at root; baseUrl already /node-sdk/)
modules.base_url_strategy: docusaurus.config.ts already sets baseUrl=/node-sdk/, so absolute asset paths are emitted under /node-sdk/. pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm build.
modules.build: cd website && pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm build

modules.name: go-sdk
modules.base_url_strategy: Hugo: pass -b /go-sdk/ so root-relative assets resolve under /go-sdk/. hugo mod get pulls the Hextra theme.
modules.build: cd website && hugo mod get github.com/imfing/hextra && hugo --gc --minify -b /go-sdk/ -d <out>
